use_cases: Create interactive physics-based landing pages where elements respond to gravity
Build engaging product demos with realistic object physics and collisions
Design playful interactive experiences with draggable physics objects
Implement SVG-based physics simulations with complex shapes
Add gravity and physics interactivity to marketing microsites
ai_summary: Gravity is an interactive physics simulation component built with Matter.js that renders physics-enabled objects with configurable gravity, drag interactions, and SVG path support. It creates engaging visual experiences where elements behave realistically according to physics laws, supporting cursor grabbing, collision detection, and customizable gravity vectors. The component is ideal for creating memorable interactive landing pages, product demos, and creative marketing experiences with a playful, physics-based aesthetic.
